value.rationale: The spending cap check returned `ok: false`. The estimated order total of $189.00 exceeds the family's $75.00 monthly autonomous spending cap. No user override is in place to authorize this amount. This is a clear policy violation requiring rejection.
value.remediation: Reduce the order quantity so the total falls at or below $75.00 (approximately 3 packs at the implied ~$23.63/pack), or have a parent/guardian explicitly approve the full $189.00 order by setting an override for this action category before resubmitting.
